name: event-stream-historic-fixture
description: Sanitized recreation of the November 2018 event-stream@3.3.6 maintainer-takeover attack (flatmap-stream payload). The original malice lived in a transitive dep's payload that decrypted at runtime against the host process and exfiltrated wallet credentials. The structural shape that would fire chainsaw's install-script detector is a postinstall that reaches the network and an obfuscated payload child_process.exec — both reproduced here against placeholder targets so the detector parity tests can assert on the same booleans the live package would have triggered.
